notes: v0.16.4 — GRINDARE chip is now clickable (opens grindarestudio.com) with a 2x bigger logo flush-left, gold hover wash + scanlines, and a VISIT hint on hover. DAILY MISSION card is fully redesigned: animated mission seal (rotating octagon ring + dotted inner ring + pulsing 5-point star), ticket-style REWARD strip with diagonal cut corner + perforation dots, segmented progress bar with tick marks at 25/50/75 and a bright moving cap. Windows only.
